form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign fifth of 12 at Doncaster October 25 over 1000m, on heavy track; 2.75 len behind Smart Vision carrying 56.5kg at $15. Previously first up; ran last of 8 at Epsom Downs in the LR The Surrey Stakes June 6 over 1400m, 9 len behind Formal with 58kg at $34. Looks very hard to beat.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 19 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1200m, 6 len behind Fine Interview with 56kg at $51. The start before that 8th of 11 at Wolverhampton on March 20 over 1200m, 7 len behind Dark Ace carrying 61kg at $12. Looking to others for the winner.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Wolverhampton October 18 over 1200m, 13 len behind Super Saiyan with 60kg at $6.50. First up last campaign seventh of 10 at Windsor June 9 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Regal Envoy with 53kg at $13. See how he returns.

form.formComment: Most recently second last in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on March 19 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Juan Les Pins carrying 61kg at $4. The run before that ran last of 12 at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 1400m, 13 len behind Down To The Kid carrying 61kg at $13. Should go well in this line up.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 14 at Nottingham October 2 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Jenever carrying 58.5kg at $10. Previously first up; 14th of 17 at York July 26 2024 over 1400m, 7 len behind Craven carrying 55.5kg at $51. Strong top three prospect.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 11 at Wolverhampton on March 20 over 1200m, 3 len behind Dark Ace with 60kg at $23. The race before that 9th of 12 at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 1200m, 5 len behind Star Chorus carrying 60kg at $8.50. Working up to a win. Major player.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation by 0.8 len this track October 28 over 1200m slow track defeating Station X carrying 60.5kg at $6. When resuming last campaign fourth of 13 at Ripon April 17 over 1200m, 3 len behind Dakota Gold with 58.5kg at $8. Looks the testing material.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run in the home straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 8th of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on March 12 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Grant Wood with 60kg at $8. Previously second-up won by 1.3 len at Beverley April 16 over 1000m defeating Elegant Erin carrying 59kg at $2.60. Expect a better outcome this time.
